refactoring_session.summary: Extract duplicated utilities, unify polling loops, fix CI/linter settings, clean up naming, encapsulate global state, split monolithic Execute function, extract C# TargetResolver, and expand Go/C# test coverage.

prs.title: refactor: extract duplicated utilities
prs.notes: Pure moves only. No behavior change.

prs.title: refactor: extract ExponentialBackoffLoop for status polling
prs.notes: Loop body extracted verbatim into reusable helper.

prs.title: chore: enable linters and fix CI inconsistencies
prs.notes: Added explicit linters. Fixed format check to fail on diff. Aligned upload-artifact versions.

prs.title: refactor: extract duplicated GetTypeName into SchemaUtility
prs.notes: C# GetTypeName logic consolidated. No behavior change.

prs.title: refactor: naming clean-up
prs.notes: Renamed identifiers to match Go/C# conventions. ColorTeal -> ColorGold.

prs.title: refactor: encapsulate instance cache into InstanceCache struct
prs.notes: Package-level cache variables moved into InstanceCache. defaultCache singleton.

prs.title: refactor: encapsulate client.Debug into Client struct
prs.notes: Added Client struct with Debug field. DefaultClient singleton. Preserved Send/SendBatch top-level wrappers.

prs.title: refactor: remove global currentCategory, pass category explicitly
prs.notes: Eliminated global currentCategory string. All helpers now accept explicit category parameter.

prs.title: refactor: split Execute into runStandaloneCommand and runUnityCommand
prs.notes: Extracted standalone and Unity-connected command switches into separate functions. Execute reduced from ~180 to ~50 lines.

prs.title: refactor: extract async polling pattern into poll.WaitForAsyncJob
prs.notes: Consolidated duplicate async polling + log suppression pattern into poll.WaitForAsyncJob.

prs.title: refactor: remove os.Exit from pingCmd
prs.notes: Replaced os.Exit(1) with error return. main.go's run() handles exit code uniformly.

prs.title: refactor: remove os.Exit from flag parse failure
prs.notes: Replaced os.Exit(1) with error return. Removed duplicated stderr output logic.

prs.title: refactor: remove os.Exit from resp.Success check
prs.notes: Replaced os.Exit(1) with error return including resp.Message. Unified exit code handling in main.go.

prs.title: refactor(client): move remaining globals into Client struct
prs.notes: Encapsulated defaultCache and isProcessDead into Client. Added NewClient(). Package-level wrappers preserved for backward compatibility.

prs.title: refactor(cmd): unify send patterns in runUnityCommand
prs.notes: Removed case-specific local send closures in test/manage_packages. All cases now use consistent send+resolve pattern.

prs.title: refactor(client): deduplicate Send vs SendBatch HTTP logic
prs.notes: Extracted debugPost and processHTTPResponse helpers. Reduced ~30 lines of duplicated HTTP handling logic.

prs.title: refactor(cmd): externalize help strings from root.go
prs.notes: Moved ~920 lines of hardcoded help strings to //go:embed files. Created 25 topic help files.

prs.title: refactor(c#): action-level dispatch for tool handlers
prs.notes: Auto-registered public static methods as action handlers. Removed Handle/HandleCommand boilerplate from 6 tool files. Tested via CLI against live Unity Editor.

prs.title: refactor(c#): split HeraAgentAssetConfigWindow into partial classes
prs.notes: Split 2,028-line monolithic window into Model/View/Controller using partial class. Verified via asset-config CLI.

prs.title: refactor(c#): extract TargetResolver for shared GameObject/Component resolution
prs.notes: Extracted ResolveGameObject, ResolveComponent<T>, ResolveTransform into shared helper. Removed duplicated resolution logic from 3 tool files. Preserved Component->GameObject fallback and alt path keys.

prs.title: test(go): add unit tests for doctor and install commands
prs.notes: TestExtractMdSection, TestExtractAgentRules, TestSameFile, TestResolveSymlink, TestGetInstallPaths, TestCopyFile. 8 top-level tests, 15 subtests — all pass.

prs.title: test(go): add unit tests for internal/poll package
prs.notes: TestExponentialBackoffLoop (immediate success, timeout, interval doubling), TestWaitForFile (file appears, timeout, invalid JSON, parse error), TestWaitForAsyncJob. 9 pass, 1 skip (UnityStopped requires live state).

prs.title: test(go): add unit tests for internal/assetconfig package
prs.notes: TestConfigFilePath, TestDefaultAssets, TestLoadConfig (no file, valid JSON, invalid JSON), TestSaveConfig round-trip, TestToggleAsset, TestSetAssetEnabled, TestGetEnabledAssets, TestIsEnabled, TestCategoryNamesAndOrder. 11 pass.

prs.title: test(csharp): add HierarchyPath editor tests
prs.notes: Build root/nested/null, Find root/nested/empty/non-existent. MenuItem: HeraAgent > Tests > HierarchyPath. Verified Unity Editor compilation.

remaining_candidates: All planned candidates completed. ManageUI helper inspection found no actual duplication across files.
